text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 11 

WA = Washington 
WI = Wisconsin 
WV = West Virginia 
 WY = Wyoming 
Null = Unknown 

COMMENT: CCW derived this variable by taking the SSA state/county code on the CME record for that beneficiary 
in the CMS enrollment database and linking it to the corresponding state postal abbreviation. If we 
could not find a state using this method, we set the variable equal to the state
